blind.title: Will Ariana Grande be #1 on Spotify's Daily Top Songs Global chart for at least 12 chart days in July 2026?
blind.subtitle: At least 12 days
blind.rules_primary: If  Ariana Grande is #1 on the Spotify Daily Top Songs Global chart for at least 12 chart days in July 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.

blind.title: Will Donald J. Trump attend The 2026 FIFA World Cup Final?
blind.subtitle: Yes
blind.rules_primary: If Donald J. Trump attends The 2026 FIFA World Cup Final, then the market resolves to Yes.
blind.rules_secondary: Attendance is confirmed if the person is reported present at the event by any Source Agency, including social media posts by the person themselves. Brief appearances or partial attendance count as attendance. Kalshi is not affiliated, associated, authorized, endorsed by, or in any way officially connected with the Fédération Internationale de Football Association (FIFA) or the World Cup. All trademarks, logos, and brand names are the property of their respective owners.

blind.title: Will the 7-day moving average of transit calls through the Strait of Hormuz as reported by the IMF PortWatch be above 60 before August 1, 2026?
blind.subtitle: Before Aug 1, 2026
blind.rules_primary: If the 7-day moving average of transit calls through the Strait of Hormuz as reported by the IMF PortWatch is above 60 before August 1, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.

blind.title: Will it be reported by any of the Source Agencies that the Maine Democratic Party selects Graham Platner's replacement through a special state convention before Aug 1, 2026?
blind.subtitle: Special convention
blind.rules_primary: If the Maine Democratic Party selects Graham Platner's replacement through a special state convention  after Issuance and before Aug 1, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
blind.rules_secondary: Only reporting from any of the Source Agencies qualifies for the purposes of this market. Reports that merely reference prior publications (from before Issuance) do not qualify. Republishing of content originally produced by other sources (e.g., wire services) only qualifies if the content is hosted on the outlet's official platform and the outlet is clearly identified as the publishing entity. If, under some scenario, multiple strikes should resolve to Yes, the market will resolve to 1 / N where N is the number of tied markets.
sibling_titles: Platner drops out with no replacement

blind.title: Will the maximum WTI front month settle price reach $82 by Jul 31, 2026?
blind.subtitle: 82.01 or above
blind.rules_primary: If ICE reports that the maximum price of oil (as defined exclusively by the set of WTI front-month settle prices) is above $82 between Issuance and Jul 31, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
